description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow set on a rectangular plot with a flat roof and open-plan layout. The structure features large windows and sliding glass doors, allowing for ample natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor flow. The exterior is predominantly white with gray accents, complemented by landscaped green lawns and several ornamental trees. There is a covered carport with space for multiple vehicles, and a patio area with outdoor seating. The property is enclosed by low boundary walls, providing privacy while maintaining an open feel. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, landscaped lawns, and a covered carport, surrounded by low boundary walls and ornamental trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, carport, and landscaped lawn with trees and boundary wall.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport with parked cars, patio area, and open lawn extending along the length of the bungalow.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, additional windows, and the continuation of the boundary wall and greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the patio, outdoor seating, and the arrangement of trees and windows along the side facade.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
